## OpenSpec Traceability Checklist

- [ ] This PR references an OpenSpec change directory: `openspec/changes/<change-name>`
- [ ] This PR references affected requirement(s): `Requirement: <name>` with spec path
- [ ] I confirmed whether this PR changes behavior or only implementation details
- [ ] If behavior changed, spec/proposal/tasks were updated before merge
- [ ] Verification evidence is attached (tests/manual validation against scenario)
